title: Micronisation Of Atenolol

Here are five advantages and features of Micronisation Of Atenolol::

2. Improved solubility:: The micronisation process improves the solubility of Atenolol, making it easier to dissolve in the body.
3. Better stability:: Micronisation Of Atenolol improves the stability of the drug, which means that it has a longer shelf life and is less likely to degrade over time.
